\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
  \setlength{\topsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\partopsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\parsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}%
}}
\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
# First digit probabilities
first_digit <- data.frame(
  digit = 1:9,
  probability = log10(1 + 1/1:9),
  position = "First"
)

# Second digit probabilities
second_digit <- data.frame(
  digit = 0:9,
  probability = sapply(0:9, function(d) sum(log10(1 + 1/(10 * 1:9 + d)))),
  position = "Second"
)

# Third digit probabilities
third_digit <- data.frame(
  digit = 0:9,
  probability = sapply(0:9, function(d) sum(log10(1 + 1/(10 * 10:99 + d)))),
  position = "Third"
)

# Combine data
benford_data <- bind_rows(first_digit, second_digit, third_digit)

# Create line plots
benford_digit_plot <- ggplot(benford_data, aes(x = digit, y = probability, group = position)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~position, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Digit",
    y = "Probability"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

benford_digit_plot
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
\par\addvspace{\topsep}
